title: Under 5 minutes to a deployed LLM endpoint — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: RunPod is a serverless GPU inference platform founded in 2022 that enables deployment of LLM endpoints in under 5 minutes. The platform has grown to $120 million annual recurring revenue with 500,000 developers and offers pay-per-request pricing on infrastructure like H100s.
